name: Eggplant and Pepper Casserole with Rice
recipeIngredient: 1 Green bell pepper, cut into 1/2-inch squares
1 Red or yellow bell pepper, cut into 1/2-inch squares
4 medium Tomatoes (or 16-oz can), peeled, seeded and cut into large pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse rice and cover with warm water. Set aside while preparing vegetables.
2. Preheat the oven to 375 degrees.
3. Heat oil in a wide skillet over medium heat. Add eggplant and onion, sautéing until evenly coated with oil.
4. Cook eggplant for about 15 minutes, or until it becomes tender.
5. Add bell peppers, tomatoes, spices (cumin, coriander, turmeric, ginger, cinnamon, cayenne), cilantro, parsley, and pepper to the skillet. Stir to combine.
6. Drain cooked rice and add it to the vegetables along with salt. Mix well and cook for several minutes, stirring frequently.
7. Add water and bring the mixture to a boil.
8. Transfer the contents of the skillet to a baking dish. Cover with foil and bake in the preheated oven until the rice is fully cooked, approximately 45 minutes.
9. Garnish with fresh cilantro leaves before serving.
Serves: 6
Nutritional Information per Serving: 249 calories; 4 grams protein; 7 grams fat; 40 grams carbohydrates; 0 grams cholesterol; 195 milligrams sodium; 6 grams fiber
